title: The Bridge of Sighs
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A British art historian in Venice discovers a 500-year-old conspiracy hidden in the paintings of the Doge's Palace.
long_description: Dr. Eleanor Chase, a British art historian specializing in Venetian Renaissance painting, arrives in Venice to authenticate a newly discovered Tintoretto sketch. She soon realizes the sketch contains a hidden code — a pentimento revealing a 500-year-old conspiracy buried within the official paintings of the Doge's Palace. The Doge's propaganda paintings were designed to glorify Venice, but beneath the gilded surface lies a systematic cover-up of a secret treaty, a murdered Doge, and a fortune in stolen gold. Commissario Bianchi of the Venetian art crimes unit and a mysterious restorer named Marco must help her uncover the truth before the conspirators silence her.
characters: Dr. Eleanor Chase — British art historian, meticulous and intuitive
Commissario Paolo Bianchi — Venetian police, art crimes division
Marco Valieri — The Restorer, descendant of a Renaissance painter
Antonio Donato — Wealthy Venetian patron, head of the conspiracy
Elena Morosini — Archivista at the Venetian State Archives
Luca Ferrante — Donato's lieutenant and enforcer
